title: Remaining Extremely Bullish China Supports Dry Bulk Bullishness
section_path: Remaining Extremely Bullish China Supports Dry Bulk Bullishness
section_path_text: Remaining Extremely Bullish China Supports Dry Bulk Bullishness
summary:
Main
By Jeffrey Landsberg
Overall dry bulk rates increased again last week, this time with only supramax rates falling (and only by a small amount). Also of note is that thermal coal prices ended last week setting another new 2026 high. Image reference: Chart 1.jpg | assets/2026-05-08_remaining-extremely-bullish-china-supports-dry-bulk-bullishness_img_chart1_8f7eebcb056d.jpg
It remains not only thermal coal prices that are faring well in China (and globally).
